statement: Autosave strategy — MVP uses full-tree debounced save. Code should still seed named mutation commands — Affects useBuilderNodes.ts, node.helpers.ts, future builderMutations.ts, API save payloads.
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User gets automatic saving without needing to understand
